mapper.select: SELECT FROM `expert_qualification_application` WHERE `applicant_user_id` = #{applicantUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY `application_id` DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `expert_qualification_application` WHERE `applicant_user_id` = #{applicantUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND `status` IN ('PENDING_DEPT_REVIEW', 'PENDING_SCIENCE_REVIEW')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `expert_qualification_application` ( `applicant_user_id`, `applicant_dept_id`, `specialty`, `professional_title`, `application_reason`, `status`, `dept_reviewer_user_id`, `dept_review_opinion`, `dept_review_remark`, `dept_reviewed_at`, `science_reviewer_user_id`, `science_review_opinion`, `science_review_remark`, `science_reviewed_at`, `created_at`, `updated_at` ) VALUES ( #{applicantUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{applicantDeptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{specialty, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{professionalTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicationReason, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptReviewerUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptReviewOpinion, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{deptReviewRemark, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{deptReviewedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{scienceReviewerUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{scienceReviewOpinion, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{scienceReviewRemark, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{scienceReviewedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE `expert_qualification_application` SET `applicant_user_id` = #{applicantUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `applicant_dept_id` = #{applicantDeptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `specialty` = #{specialty, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `professional_title` = #{professionalTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `application_reason` = #{applicationReason, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `status` = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `dept_reviewer_user_id` = #{deptReviewerUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `dept_review_opinion` = #{deptReviewOpinion, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `dept_review_remark` = #{deptReviewRemark, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `dept_reviewed_at` = #{deptReviewedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `science_reviewer_user_id` = #{scienceReviewerUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `science_review_opinion` = #{scienceReviewOpinion, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `science_review_remark` = #{scienceReviewRemark, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `science_reviewed_at` = #{scienceReviewedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `created_at` = #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `updated_at` = #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE `application_id` = #{applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
